ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner who owns the repository */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "repo_type" TEXT /* Type of repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the commit was made */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash for the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the commit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message */,
  "commit_parent" TEXT /* Parent commit hash */,
  "commit_branch" TEXT /* Branch name where the commit was made */,
  "commit_files_changed" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the author belongs to */,
  "author_username" TEXT /* Author's username */,
  "author_avatar" TEXT /* Author's avatar URL */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Author's bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the development team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Team description */,
  "team_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "team_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Project description */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Project priority */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Project status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric entry */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit that was analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level of the analysis */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_logs_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric entry that triggered the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "user_username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the metric data */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
